pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 31-32 creates review with this exact name; export_result.sh line 32 queries using this name; task.json description references this name
setup_task.sh line 55 inserts charlie.vendor as review item; task.json description line 3 specifies this user for revocation
setup_task.sh lines 53-54 insert both users as review items; task.json description line 4 specifies both users for keep status
task.json description line 3 specifies comment 'Contract ended'; verifier.py line 130 checks for 'contract ended' (case-insensitive match)

privileged_info_summary: This task involves completing a Q3 2025 HR DB Access Review in Eramba. The review contains three user accounts: alice.admin and bob.user should be marked with a 'Keep' status, while charlie.vendor should be marked for revocation with the comment 'Contract ended'. All review data is synthetic and created during task setup via SQL inserts into the Eramba database.
